payload.answer: The new statement conflicts with the existing memory: one says Sam from Goldman has two children, while the other says Sam from Goldman has no children.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman has two children.
New: Sam from Goldman has no children.

entity_resolution.reason: The same entity is referenced in both statements (Sam from Goldman), so the issue is factual conflict rather than entity mismatch.

evidence.existing_fact: Sam from Goldman has two children.
evidence.new_fact: Sam from Goldman has no children.
evidence.reason: These statements assign incompatible child counts to the same person.
